## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated under `tests/` when behavior changes.
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes.
- [ ] `ruff check threatlens/ tests/` is clean.
- [ ] `mypy threatlens/` is clean for files touched by this PR.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry under `## [Unreleased]` when user-visible behavior changes.
- [ ] README usage text is updated for new or changed CLI flags.
